title: nephrodium protensum
intro: Nephrodium protensum, also known as the sensitive fern, is a type of ancient vascular plant that belongs to the family Osmundaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The plant is also rich in antioxidants and has been found to have health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing stress, and boosting the immune system. Nephrodium protensum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
